issues_classified.description: No ImageNet experiments despite 7+ iterations of flagging. Project constraints mandate ImageNet. Paper claims 'sufficiently overparameterized problems' but evidence is CIFAR-10/100 only (32x32, <=15M params). This is the single largest barrier to top-venue acceptance. Zero diagnostic work has been done (no smoke test, no data path verification).
issues_classified.suggestion: PHASE 0 (30 min): SSH into server, verify ImageNet data path, run 1-epoch ResNet-50 smoke test with batch_size=64, document specific failure or success. PHASE 1 (8 GPU-hours): ImageNet-100 (100-class subset) x 3 methods (constant, cwd_hard, no_wd) x 3 seeds x ResNet-50 = 9 runs. PHASE 2 (1 hour): Add Table 7 with ImageNet results, update abstract/conclusion. Verification: 9 summary.json files with valid accuracy.

issues_classified.description: Statistical power insufficient for null-result claims. N=3 gives ~15-20% power for 0.5% effects. TOST equivalence confirmed in only 6/12 comparisons at delta=1.0%. A null-result paper requires higher evidentiary burden than a positive-result paper.
issues_classified.suggestion: Add 2 seeds (789, 1024) for 4 key AdamW CIFAR-10 comparisons: constant vs {cwd_hard, swd, cosine_schedule, no_wd}. Cost: 8 runs, ~2 GPU-hours. Recompute TOST with N=5, expect pass rate to improve from 50% to >75%. Can run in parallel with ImageNet on separate GPUs. Verification: 8 new summary.json files; TOST table updated in paper.

issues_classified.description: CSI listed as a primary contribution (Section 1.3, item 2) despite zero predictive value (rho<0.3, p>0.3) and arbitrary component weights (0.4, 0.3, 0.3). Sensitivity analysis tests only 3 nearly-identical weight sets. Flagged for 6+ iterations without demotion. This is a <1 hour text fix that has been deferred every iteration.
issues_classified.suggestion: In Section 1.3, change CSI from 'contribution' to 'exploratory diagnostic tool'. Add honest framing: 'CSI captures coupling stability differences but does not predict accuracy outcomes in our experiments.' Reduce CSI discussion by 50%. Estimated: 45 minutes. Verification: Section 1.3 no longer lists CSI as a contribution.

issues_classified.description: Paper references Appendix A but no appendix exists. 6th consecutive iteration of this issue. Missing proof sketches for theorems referenced in framework section.
issues_classified.suggestion: Two options: (A) Write 1-page appendix with proof sketches for the 2 remaining referenced results (Phi closure, BEM derivation). Estimated: 1.5 hours. (B) Remove all appendix references from paper text. Estimated: 15 minutes. Verification: grep paper.md for 'Appendix' returns zero hits OR appendix file exists.

issues_classified.description: Abstract implies full factorial design ('7 methods, 2 optimizers, 2 architectures, 2 datasets') suggesting 168 runs. Actual: 84 (ResNet-20) + 21 (VGG-16-BN SGD/CIFAR-10 only) = 105. Reviewers expecting VGG+AdamW or VGG+CIFAR-100 will be disappointed.
issues_classified.suggestion: Revise abstract to decompose: '105 experiments: 84 on ResNet-20 (7 methods x 2 optimizers x 2 datasets x 3 seeds) and 21 on VGG-16-BN (7 methods x SGD x CIFAR-10 x 3 seeds).' Estimated: 5 minutes. Verification: abstract states 84+21.

issues_classified.description: NoBN ablation data from iter_005 exists (constant: 87.74, CWD: 87.62) but only 2/7 methods tested. Section 6.2 presents these as evidence for the BN mechanism hypothesis, but spread 0.11pp WITHOUT BN is narrower than 0.25pp WITH BN, contradicting the hypothesis. Presenting 2/7 as evidence for a 7-method claim is misleading.
issues_classified.suggestion: Option A (preferred): Run remaining 5 NoBN methods (5 x 3 seeds = 15 runs, ~4 GPU-hours). Option B: Remove partial NoBN results from Section 6.2 and rewrite BN discussion as untested hypothesis. Do NOT present 2/7 as evidence. Verification: Section 6.2 either has all 7 NoBN methods or no NoBN data.

issues_classified.description: Section 5.7 (Cumulative Alignment Analysis) presents two non-significant correlations (rho=-0.161, p=0.485; rho=0.107, p=0.645) and occupies substantial space for a double-null finding. While now correctly framed as null results (improvement from iter_010), the section adds limited insight beyond AIS invariance already covered.
issues_classified.suggestion: Condense Section 5.7 to 1-2 paragraphs or move to appendix. The null result is informative but does not need its own full section with figures. Estimated: 30 minutes. Verification: Section 5.7 is <=2 paragraphs or moved to appendix.

issues_classified.description: Orphan figure certified_band.png still contains PMP-WD in legend. Not referenced in paper text but exists in figures directory. Could contaminate LaTeX compilation if accidentally included.
issues_classified.suggestion: Delete certified_band.png from figures directory or regenerate without PMP-WD. Estimated: 5 minutes. Verification: file deleted or PMP-WD absent from legend.

issues_classified.description: Proposition 1 (composition closure: product of non-negative functions is non-negative) is trivially obvious and inflates theoretical contribution appearance.
issues_classified.suggestion: Verify Proposition 1 is an inline remark, not a labeled proposition. If still labeled, downgrade. Estimated: 5 minutes.

issues_classified.description: VGG-16-BN tested only with SGD/CIFAR-10 (21 runs). Architecture x optimizer effects fully confounded. Paper cannot distinguish whether invariance is due to BN, optimizer, or architecture without VGG+AdamW comparison.
issues_classified.suggestion: Add VGG-16-BN + AdamW on CIFAR-10: 7 methods x 3 seeds = 21 runs, ~6 GPU-hours. If VGG+AdamW shows invariance, confirms cross-architecture robustness. If not, revise BN hypothesis. Lower priority than ImageNet and extra seeds. Verification: 21 new summary.json under vgg16bn/adamw/.

issues_classified.description: Reproducibility gaps: CSI Hessian computation unspecified, UnifiedAdamW/UnifiedSGD code not released, SWD running mean details missing, GPU type and wall-clock time not reported in paper.
issues_classified.suggestion: Add to Section 4 or appendix: GPU type (RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell, 98GB), per-experiment wall-clock time (~15 min/ResNet-20 run), code release placeholder. Add CSI computation pseudocode. Estimated: 1 hour. Verification: Section 4 contains GPU type and wall-clock time.

issues_fixed: Figure 8 (theorem2_validation.png) PMP-WD ghost data: FIXED. Figure now shows 7 methods, N=21 data points, correlations recomputed correctly (rho=-0.161/p=0.485, rho=0.107/p=0.645). (iter_010 C2: FIXED)
Figure 5 (diagnostic heatmap) half_lambda BEM=0.000: FIXED. Now shows BEM=0.500, matching Table 6. (iter_010 C1: FIXED, confirmed by supervisor cross-validation)
Title 'Why' overclaim: FIXED. Changed to 'When', removing causation claim that was unsupported by evidence. (iter_010 C8: FIXED)
Alignment analysis text updated to N=21 with correct rho/p values after PMP-WD removal. (iter_010 C6: PARTIALLY FIXED -- framing improved but section still occupies excessive space)
success_patterns: Data integrity cleanup achieved: ALL figure-table-text consistency issues that plagued iterations 7-10 are now resolved. This is the first clean-data state in 5 iterations. Confirms data-first, text-second ordering.

Targeted fix strategy outperforms rewrites: iter_011 focused on specific figure regeneration and precise text edits. Score rose from 6.5 to 6.75 (supervisor JSON) / 7.0 (supervisor markdown). No quality crashes from rewrites.

Statistical methodology remains above community norm: paired t-tests with Bonferroni, Cohen's d, TOST, power analysis, explicit detection thresholds. This is the paper's defensible competitive advantage.
Three-stage review pipeline (supervisor + critic + writing review) catches distinct issues. Supervisor caught heatmap BEM and title; critic caught missing appendix. Coverage is complementary.
Phi modulator taxonomy and CWD/random-mask bang-bang control insight praised across 9+ iterations. This is the paper's structural backbone.
Strategic scope reduction to empirical-only paper (removing Lyapunov/PMP/certified-band) was correct. The paper is internally consistent and defensible.
systemic_patterns: EXPERIMENT EXECUTION BLOCKAGE (critical): ImageNet has been flagged for 7 iterations with ZERO progress. Not even a diagnostic smoke test has been attempted. The system can plan experiments but fails to execute them when they require non-trivial setup (new dataset, new architecture). Root cause is likely: no Phase 0 diagnosis step in the planning pipeline.

TEXT FIX DEFERRAL: Six text-level fixes (CSI demotion, alignment condensation, abstract decomposition, appendix references, Proposition 1, reproducibility details) each take <1 hour but persist across 3-6 iterations. They are always deprioritized below data/figure work. Solution: batch them as a single 3-hour block at iteration start.
QUALITY OSCILLATION PATTERN: Score trajectory 5.0->7.8->8.2->5.5->5.5->7.0->5.0->6.5->6.5->6.0->6.5->6.75. Gains come from experiment/data work; crashes from rewrites. Lesson: never do full rewrites.

SCORE CEILING AT ~6.75 WITHOUT NEW EXPERIMENTS: Text-only iterations (iter_007-011) have oscillated between 6.0-6.75. Supervisor estimates: ImageNet -> 7.5, + seeds + NoBN -> 8.0. Experiment execution is the only path to meaningful improvement.

suggestions: ZERO GPU utilization for iterations 7-11 (5 consecutive text-only iterations). All 8 GPUs idle. This is the primary efficiency failure.

Proposed compute plan for iter_012: ImageNet-100 (9 runs, ~8 GPU-hours on 2-3 GPUs) + Extra seeds (8 runs, ~2 GPU-hours on 1-2 GPUs) + NoBN completion (15 runs, ~4 GPU-hours on 2 GPUs) = 32 runs, ~14 GPU-hours total. With 8 GPUs, wall-clock ~2-3 hours.
All three experiment campaigns are independent and can run in parallel on different GPU subsets.
Text fix batch (CSI demotion, appendix, abstract, reproducibility) should run CONCURRENTLY with experiments, not sequentially.
VGG+AdamW (21 runs, ~6 GPU-hours) is lower priority but can fill remaining GPU slots if capacity allows.

recommended_focus: 1. BATCH TEXT FIXES (3 hours, before/during experiments): CSI demotion, appendix references, abstract 84+21 decomposition, Section 5.7 condensation, reproducibility details, orphan certified_band.png deletion
2. EXPERIMENT PHASE 0 (30 min): ImageNet smoke test -- diagnose why 7 iterations produced zero progress. Document specific blocker or confirm feasibility.
3. EXPERIMENT: ImageNet-100 (9 runs, ~8 GPU-hours) -- highest single-action ROI, estimated +0.75 score points
4. EXPERIMENT: Extra seeds N=5 for 4 key comparisons (8 runs, ~2 GPU-hours) -- strengthens TOST power for null-result claims
5. EXPERIMENT: NoBN completion 5/7 methods (15 runs, ~4 GPU-hours) -- properly tests or falsifies BN hypothesis
6. LOWER PRIORITY: VGG+AdamW (21 runs, ~6 GPU-hours) -- disentangles architecture x optimizer confound
